text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 91 

ORG_TXNMY_CD 

LABEL: Organization Taxonomy Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the health care provider taxonomy (HCPT) code used to indicate the billing provider's 
specialty. This is a unique identifier for a classification of health care specialty at a specialized level of 
defined medical activity within a medical field as created by the National Uniform Claim Committee
